description: Configure and deploy a content-based routing channel named 'HL7_Message_Router' in NextGen Connect. The channel must receive HL7 v2.x messages via a TCP Listener on port 6661 (MLLP) and route them to specific directories based on the message type (MSH-9.1). Create three File Writer destinations: 'ADT_Destination' (Filter: MSH-9.1 equals 'ADT') outputting to /tmp/output/adt/, 'ORM_Destination' (Filter: MSH-9.1 equals 'ORM') outputting to /tmp/output/orm/, and 'ORU_Destination' (Filter: MSH-9.1 equals 'ORU') outputting to /tmp/output/oru/. Use unique filenames for the output (e.g., '${message.messageId}.hl7') and ensure the channel is deployed and 'STARTED'. Sample HL7 messages are provided in /home/ga/ for testing.
